[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100001 3
1 0011100 3
2 0101000 2
3 1011011 5
4 0011000 2
5 1100001 3
6 0100011 3
7 0010111 4

23 0010111 4 match 7
